I'll add a MiDaS-DepthMapPreprocessor depth node after the image loader and wire it to the controlnet.
```batch
midas_depthmappreprocessor = MiDaS-DepthMapPreprocessor(a=6.283185307179586, bg_threshold=0.1, resolution=512, image=loadimage.image, near=loadimage)
wanvideocontrolnet.depth = midas_depthmappreprocessor.out(0)
done()
```
